title: ghostlight user configuration file
description: User-level configuration for ghostlight. Both fields are optional; an absent file means no user layer.

preset.description: Preset supplying the preset-default layer. When absent, the built-in Minimal defaults (equal to safe) apply.

config.description: Flat map of dotted key name to value. Each entry sets the user layer for that key.

engine.connection.first_call_wait_ms.description: Upper bound on the first-call wait for the extension handshake.

content.security.secrets.redact.description: Redact values of secret fields (password/OTP/payment) in read_page output.

content.security.sacred_domains.description: Domains the agent must never touch: any tool call on a tab showing one of these domains, and any navigation targeting one, is denied. Always enforced.

audit.enabled.description: Record one audit line per tool call (the flight recorder).

audit.file.path.description: Audit file path; empty means the platform default location.

governance.mode.description: Default enforcement mode when the active manifest does not set one: observe records shadow denials, enforce blocks.
